scenario: syncFixtures() parses the group label from a football-data v4 match payload, where the field is 'GROUP_A'..'GROUP_L' (uppercase, underscore — matching the stage enum convention).
agent_behavior_observed: Used m.group.replace('Group ', '').slice(0, 1), a no-op on 'GROUP_A' that returns 'G' for every group, so every team was tagged group G.
expected_behavior: Parse the trailing letter from the 'GROUP_X' format (accepting the legacy 'Group X' form too) and validate it is A-L.
notes: Recurring class: assuming a legacy API string shape. Caught post-merge; recovery path was the backfill_team_group_letters RPC in migration 0010.
